description_long: This object is a rectangular parcel with a solid, box-like form and a smooth, matte exterior. The main body is a reddish-brown color, and it features a single, irregularly shaped blue marking or label on one of its longer faces. The blue marking appears to be painted or printed directly onto the surface, possibly serving as an identifier or decorative element. The parcel has sharp, clean edges and flat surfaces, suggesting it is made from a sturdy material such as cardboard or a lightweight composite. There are no visible openings, handles, or seams, indicating it is fully sealed. The overall appearance is utilitarian, suitable for shipping or storage in an urban environment.
description: A reddish-brown rectangular parcel with a single blue, irregular marking on one face, featuring smooth, flat surfaces and no visible openings.
description_view_0: The front face shows the blue marking prominently near the bottom edge of the reddish-brown parcel.
description_view_1: The blue marking is visible but appears slightly more elongated and shifted to the left on this side.
description_view_2: The blue marking is seen from a different angle, appearing more angular and positioned toward the left edge.
description_view_3: The blue marking is now closer to the right edge, with the shape appearing more irregular and less centered.
